programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Naked cleaner Elleigha meets perfectionist chef Louis and the chemistry is strong. Caitlin and Lucy try dating for the first time. And, can 40-year-old Asher be able to heal his past wounds?

programme.title: Millionaire Hoarders
programme.desc: Experts sift through crammed homes looking for lost treasure worth life-changing sums. At a 700-year-old Scottish castle, theres an astonishing discovery featuring a rare painting.

programme.title: Batch from Scratch: Cooking for Less
programme.desc: In Aberdeen, Joe and Suzanne help single working mum of six Vicky to regain control in the kitchen and make the most of her time and budget. On the menu: a smoky bean cobbler, chicken parmigiana and an economical alternative to meatballs.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: First to host in north Kent is clairvoyant and medium Yvette Tamara. The night gets off to a spooky start when data analyst John Tower and working mum Yemi Christopher-Soares discover a ghost busting machine.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Data analyst John Tower is second to host in north Kent. John has a passion for military re-enactment and barks orders at the table. However, not all of the guests are won over by Johns Filipino fatty pork stew and psychedelic dessert.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Project manager Yemi Christopher-Soares hopes her guests in north Kent will lap up her Nigerian-inspired menu and share her fondness for spice.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Its the penultimate night in north Kent and the turn of cocky Jono Simm, who is convinced his wholesome and hearty menu is a winner. Sadly two of his guests arent convinced by the cooking.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Its the final night in north Kent and the turn of cheeky party-loving Lisa Townend to be the host. Her menu is full of mysterious French fancies, including coq surprise, while her innovative entertainment is human roulette.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The first host, teaching assistant Michelle, hopes to share her Portuguese and American culinary heritage. Describing herself as the drunk Martha Stewart, she believes the love she puts into her menu will compensate for less-than-perfect food.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On a spectacular second night in Bedfordshire and Cambridgeshire, self-styled culinary explorer Dave serves up a daring menu melding flavours that no one else would ever think of combining - there might be a reason for that!

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Its the third night in Bedfordshire and Cambridgeshire and the turn of marketing executive Martina to cook. She hopes her menu of Thai curries and poached pears will impress her guests, one of whom doesnt like spice or fruit.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The fourth host in Bedfordshire and Cambridgeshire, tech entrepreneur Shane, is hoping to wow his guests with a menu that draws on his Jamaican heritage. His ambitious menu flirts with triumph, and his strong gin martinis also raise the bar.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the final night in Bedfordshire and Cambridgeshire, lady of leisure Michaela attempts an Italian menu inspired by a favourite restaurant near her holiday home. But how high up the leaderboard can Michaelas Italian extravaganza reach?

programme.title: George Clarkes Building Home
programme.desc: Keith and Kate return to the Scottish seaside town of Dunoon, where Kate has fond memories and family ties. But making a Victorian house work as a modern home proves challenging.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Sara Damergi helps Bernie and Vernon find a holiday home on the Canary Island of Fuerteventura, despite Vernon having never visited! Can they find the perfect place for their £150k?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Trish and Ruth love Lanzarote so much that they want to buy a holiday home there, near the popular resort of Puerto del Carmen. Sara Damergi shows them what their £140k can buy.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: What Happened Next
programme.desc: Jean Johansson revisits Lisa and Rob, who made a barn conversion in Charente their forever home. And in the lush Andalucian countryside of Velez-Málaga, Jasmine Harman catches up with Alison and Paula, and their hot tub.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: What Happened Next
programme.desc: Danni Menzies returns to the beautiful coastal town of Denia on Spains Costa Blanca to check in on Alison, Brian and their dogs. Jasmine Harman heads back to the sun-kissed shores of Kapparis for a catch-up with Bill and Sandra.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: What Happened Next
programme.desc: Craig Rowe is back in Carcassonne to catch up with Sue and Tony, who found their dream house in this stunning part of southwest France. Sara Damergi is in old-town Oliva in Spain, where sisters Sheila and Pam reconnected with their Spanish roots.

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil head to Nottingham, where Lexie and Ed are at a stalemate. Their four-bed, one-bathroom home is fit to burst, and Ed just wants to pack up and move to a bigger house. But Lexie thinks, with Kirsties help, that the house could work.

programme.title: A Woman of Substance
programme.desc: Will Emma take Macs offer to leave Fairley - and Edwin - for good? Meanwhile, Adeles sobriety re-ignites her marriage with Adam, which causes rifts in the Fairley household.

programme.title: A Woman of Substance
programme.desc: A heavily pregnant Emma establishes a new life for herself, while Edwins fiancee Priya begins to ask questions. In the 1970s, Emma confronts her eldest daughter, Edwina, and discovers Paulas secret romance.

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: At Queens Medical Centre in Nottingham, staff help a 16-year-old with a serious illness. Steve is rushed into Resus after falling from his motorbike. And 63-year-old Paul has come to AandE after partially amputating his thumb at work.

programme.title: Motorway Cops: Catching Britains Speeders

programme.title: Motorway Cops: Catching Britains Speeders

programme.title: Motorway Cops: Catching Britains Speeders

programme.title: Motorway Cops: Catching Britains Speeders

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: Exploring the fascinating lives of Britains beautiful butterflies in exquisite detail and also celebrating their enduring appeal to the British people. Britains butterflies have never been so threatened, three quarters are in decline. A search for butterflies leads to some of the most beautiful parts of Britain. It opens up the possibility that a passion for butterflies could help us preserve our cherished landscapes.

programme.sub-title: The Life and Loves of Oscar Wilde
programme.desc: A candid portrait of Oscar Wilde and his remarkable family, including revelations by his grandson Merlin Holland and Lady Alice Douglas, great-grandniece of Wildes lover Lord Alfred Bosie Douglas. Martin Shaw is the voice of Oscar Wilde.

programme.title: The Read
programme.sub-title: The Picture of Dorian Gray with Luke Thompson
programme.desc: Oscar Wildes haunting tale of beauty, vanity and moral corruption, where eternal youth comes at a terrible price. Luke Thompson delivers a spellbinding performance of Wildes only novel.

programme.title: Ibsen
programme.desc: Donald Wolfit stars as Halvard Solness in this 1958 adaptation of Henrik Ibsens play, set in Solnesss Norwegian home in the late 19th century.

programme.title: Mindful Escapes: Breathe, Release, Restore
programme.desc: Join mindfulness expert Andy Puddicombe as he focuses on change and what we can learn from how animals adapt to changes in the world around them. Why is a chameleons ability to alter its appearance crucial to its survival and what lessons are there from understanding how elephants grieve? Learning to be mindful can help us cope with lifes stresses, and Andy shows how focusing on the sights and sounds of the natural world can help us deal with change in our lives.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A plot of land in Leeds is a potential goldmine, that is if the new owner can obtain planning permission. Dion likes whats on offer at a bungalow in Derby, and Tommy thinks the layout at a south west London flat needs a reconfiguration.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: A mother and son take on a mother and daughter in todays Bargain Hunt at the Royal Highland Centre in Edinburgh. Anita Manning leads the proceedings and experts Paul Laidlaw and John Cameron are on hand to help the teams. Anita also finds out about Mauchline ware.

programme.title: JLB: The Man Who Saw the Future

programme.title: Loop
programme.sub-title: Shorts: The Family From Skye Turning Waste Plastic Into Art
programme.desc: `Scouting for Buoys is one familys mission to clean up their local beaches, and turn washed up plastic waste into unique pieces of art. Donna and her husband Carl scour the shores next to their Isle of Skye home, collecting discarded plastic, much of it fishing material, and take it back to their small artists studio overlooking the landscapes they care so much about.

programme.title: Louis Theroux Interviews...
programme.desc: Louis spends time with platinum-selling rapper Stormzy. After two years out of the spotlight, Stormzy welcomes Louis into his home in south west London to sit down for a frank and revealing conversation that covers many aspects of his life, from his childhood to the breakdown of a high-profile relationship, as well as the pressures that come with being one of the countrys best-loved musicians and role models.

programme.title: Doctor Who

programme.title: Mrs Browns Boys

Plus, after a strange phone call from a solicitor, Agnes children start to suspect one of them might be adopted. Meanwhile, Father Quinn is back from rehab, but with Agnes having trouble with a mobile phone how long will it be before he goes back in?

programme.title: Mrs Browns Boys
programme.desc: Wedding mania descends on the Brown household as the family prepare for Rory and Dinos big day. Meanwhile, Agnes gets more than she bargained for when she agrees to entertain Cathys boyfriends parents.

programme.title: Alan Partridge: Alpha Papa
programme.desc: Radio host Alan Partridge gets a chance to boost his sagging career by serving as a liaison between police and his former co-host, who has taken hostages at their radio station.

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: Donnas tutor invites her for extra coaching on his sofa, Gaz has a problem in his trousers, and Janet tries to persuade Jonny to come around for a bite of her pasties.

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: Donna goes for a filthy brunching with her tutor, Gaz finds an unusual solution to his problem, Janet tries to excite Jonny with adventurous sex, and Louise gets Jonny into serious trouble with the police.

programme.title: Boarders
programme.desc: Exam term at St Gilberts is disrupted by vandals. Leah falls under suspicion, and a serious dilemma weighs heavily on Jaheim. With the school on lockdown, how will Toby see Abby?

programme.title: Boarders
programme.desc: The boarders are teamed up with career mentors, but things quickly go wrong. Leah is fuming with Felix about the sabotage, and Femis dreams are crushed. programme.desc: We celebrate this high watermark of hits with some classic TOTP performances from this spectacular year, including studio appearances from Rick Astley with `Never Gonna Give You Up to the godfather of punk, Iggy Pop, whose unforgettable appearance on the show is one not to be missed!

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: As the 1980s draw to a close, Top of the Pops remains a broad church. We celebrate 1988 by cherry-picking the cream of the crop. The programme includes stand-out hits from Yazz, SExpress and Bomb the Bass, representing the growing popularity of house music, new Australian pop royalty Kylie Minogue and Jason Donovan, who ruled the charts along with teen stars Bros and Tiffany, soul legends Womack and Womack, the Irish mist of Enya and British reggae from Maxi Priest.

programme.title: Aftersun
programme.desc: Sophie reflects on the shared joy and private melancholy of a holiday she took with her father twenty years earlier. Memories real and imagined fill the gaps between as she tries to reconcile the father she knew with the man she didnt.

programme.title: The Capture
programme.desc: More video evidence of the attack emerges, isolating Carey even further from those around her. With pressure building to find the assassin, Careys assertion that SO15 is compromised gains little traction. Convinced that an insidious conspiracy is unfolding at the heart of the establishment, Carey takes matters into her own hands and seeks an unlikely ally in Gemma Garland. Meanwhile, Noah Pierson finds his first day at work more surprising than he ever expected...

programme.desc: As we make plans to travel beyond the Moon to new worlds, how are we preparing to become human extraterrestrials? Just how will we survive this trip into the unknown?

programme.title: The UnXplained: Mysteries of the Universe
programme.desc: The blue marble we call Earth remains in large part a mystery to the 8 billion people who live on it. We analyse how Earth came to exist, and the secrets of its survival. And we discuss how long humans will be able to call it "home."

programme.title: The UnXplained: Mysteries of the Universe
programme.desc: From asteroids and bursts of radiation to microscopic alien viruses, each one of these cosmic dangers may end human civilization as it is known.

programme.title: The UnXplained: Mysteries of the Universe
programme.desc: Humans want to go into uncharted territories to make discoveries. As the next era of space exploration begins, it must be analysed what humans will find when reaching other planets, as well as the dangers faced when trying to conquer new frontiers.

programme.title: The UnXplained: Mysteries of the Universe
programme.sub-title: The Life and Death of the Sun
programme.desc: Humanity has worshipped the Sun since the beginning of time, and yet even with our modern technology, we still know so little about it. We look if unlocking the mysteries of the Sun can be the difference between life and death for human civilization.

programme.title: What on Earth?
programme.desc: At a mysterious site in the Gobi Desert, experts discover a monster graveyard; the groundbreaking find contains the treasures of the alien beasts that once lived in this strange world.

programme.title: What on Earth?
programme.desc: Modern imaging technology and analysis from military and intelligence professionals, as well as leading scientists, investigate mysteries from strange geological occurrences to odd man-made structures as seen by more than 4,000 orbiting satellites.

programme.title: Historys Greatest Mysteries
programme.sub-title: The Hunt for Stolen Nazi Treasure
programme.desc: During World War Two, the Nazis stole vast amounts of art, gold, silver and currency, and stashed it across Europe; while some of the plunder has been recovered, much more is still missing nearly 80 years later.

programme.title: Historys Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: Its one of the most famous stories from the Bible: God sends a flood to wipe out nearly every living thing on Earth, except for Noah, his family and the animals he saves in his fabled ark.

programme.title: Holy Marvels With Dennis Quaid
programme.desc: For millennia, plagues, curses, droughts, and the violent destruction of cities have been blamed on the wrath of angry gods. But were these divine punishments mere myth, or is there proof they are based on real events?

programme.title: Ivan the Terrible

programme.title: The UnXplained With William Shatner
programme.desc: Ancient practices such as prayer, blood sports, voodoo and exorcism are often thought to be relics of bygone superstition, but there is evidence they have an impact on the physical world.

programme.title: The UnXplained With William Shatner
programme.desc: Perhaps the greatest unexplained mystery of all is what happens to us after we die. Perhaps clues to the answer lie in unusual cases of near-death experience.

programme.desc: A bizarre plane crash and an underground city point to powerful forces inside the Grand Canyon National Park.

programme.title: National Park Mysteries

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first day of this new competition is at the Blackthorn Farm BandB on Anglesey, Wales, where best pals Richard Tuke and Susan Hatch hope to be crowned best value BandB of the week. On arrival, Dan and Rachel Lonergan take in the view, and Malcolm and Fiona Piers-Taylor are feeling the vibes for their morning meditation.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Graham and Barbara Yellow pride themselves on offering basic facilities for great value for money at the White Swan Hotel in Yeadon, West Yorkshire. Richard Tuke and Susan Hatch find some hairs out of place in their room, while spiritual couple Malcolm and Fiona Piers-Taylor get good vibes from being in room number four. Over dinner, Graham and Barbara relax into their roles, leaving Rachel Lonergan feeling guilty about having labelled them as game players.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Malcolm and Fiona Piers-Taylor have an alternative approach to their business at The Old Mill House BandB in Bridport, Dorset. Richard Tuke and Susan Hatch think it will be a wigwam, while Rachel and Dan Lonergan are expecting a commune.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of this week of new episodes is to The Brighton Inn, where BandB newbies Rachel and Dan Lonergan want to offer a luxury, boutique experience for their guests. After getting negative feedback on the last visit, Malcolm and Fiona Piers-Taylor go on the offensive and give their room a thorough going-over.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Its the final day of the competition and the BandBers meet for one last time to confront their rivals. Tensions run high as the payments are revealed and the winner is announced.

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Four months after the miscarriage, Doug and Carrie are thinking about getting pregnant again.

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug is sure hes found the perfect birthday gift for Carrie. However, he learns that you really shouldnt go for the discount offer when it comes to corrective laser eye surgery.

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug tries to beat a record at work. The older members of the IPS depot arent too happy that Doug is going to break the record held by their friend.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Raymond is horrified when he thinks his `cookie nemesis flirted with him.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra gets annoyed with Ray when he seems pleased that shes picked one of her attractive friends to replace her if she dies.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra gives a bridal shower for Amy, but her good intentions get sidetracked by Maries overzealous participation.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier mistakenly believes he is the object of a secret admirer while he is dating an attractive new woman.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles moves in with Frasier, and the two drive each other crazy until Frasier hatches a plan.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.sub-title: The Seal Who Came to Dinner
programme.desc: Frasier has to dispose of a smelly dead seal that is stinking up Niles fancy dinner party.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa meets a fellow horse-lover but then falls into a circle of snooty girls. Homer takes Marge on a romantic cruise.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A charismatic new preacher comes to town and shakes things up at church. Reverend Lovejoy fights back by investigating his mysterious past.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The week begins at Becketts in Southsea, Portsmouth. The guests find the design delightful, but parking problems, a duvet disaster and a noisy night mean that host Terences feedback isnt as flawless as expected.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: At The Westby Guest House in Boscombe, Duncan and Jessie have a systematic approach to running a BandB. Although the rooms are impressive, Duncans strict house rules soon leave a sour taste.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Paul and Tracey host visit three of the week at Newell Restaurant and Rooms in Sherborne, Dorset. Terence is taken with the blissful bedding, but Duncans substandard slumber and the communal coffee zone prove controversial.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: For the final visit of the week, the BandBers embrace the great outdoors at Lydcott Glamping in Cornwall, hosted by Emma and Rich. All the guests are taken with the spectacular surroundings, but less so with their cabins and the DIY breakfast.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Dreadful duvets, bothersome beds and breakfast blues are all on the agenda as the BandBers meet up on payment day to settle their differences. After a particularly emotional discussion, we find out which BandB has won the week.

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: In Hamilton, Scott and Jaquis once-perfect pad is now a domestic battleground. With compromise in short supply, can Kirstie nail it with the extra space they need?

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: In north London, Kirstie Allsopp helps Digi find a future-proof home, while Phil Spencers with Rebecca and Sohail, whose rental is worth £200k more than their budget to buy.

programme.title: Sleepless in Seattle
programme.desc: A recently engaged woman becomes obsessed with meeting the grieving widower she heard on a late night radio show. Sam, the widower, receives hundreds of letters following the radio phone-in which was instigated by his son Jonah.

programme.desc: When Raymond lies and tells Debra that hes already bought her an incredibly thoughtful Christmas present, he frantically tries to figure out what to get her.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond

programme.desc: When Debra grudgingly agrees to let him be more involved in the daily decision making, Ray starts grocery shopping for things that he likes, and he chooses where the family will go on its next vacation.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Held captive at Frank and Maries during a snowstorm, Debra, Ray and Amy actually find themselves having a great time until Debra makes a nasty comment to Frank that totally upsets the good mood.

programme.desc: When Ray learns that Troup Leader Peggy and her daughter have targeted his parents house as a spot to make a big sale for themselves during the Frontier Girls selling competition, its all-out war.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert is ecstatic when he is recommended for the FBI job, that is, until it becomes apparent that Maries intrusive ways may be his undoing.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Since she is the only one who knows that Chandler plans to ask Monica to marry him, Phoebe helps Chandler shop for a wedding ring, while Rachels wish for Paul to reveal his emotions creates a new set of problems.

programme.desc: Chandlers romantic marriage proposal is ruined when Monicas former boyfriend returns, Joey accidentally buys a boat, and a dormitory incident reminds Ross how young his girlfriend is.

programme.desc: When Ray finally feels comfortable enough to call Debras mother `mom, he wants Debra to reciprocate and start calling Marie `mom, but, when Debra finally gets the words out, she is completely stunned at Maries reaction.

programme.desc: Monicas dream of a fairytale wedding fizzles out after she learns what her parents have done with her wedding fund. Meanwhile, Rachel fumes when a teasing Joey stumbles across her juicy late-night reading material.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Chandler doesnt want new flatmate Janine to make the apartment too `girly, Ross overdoses on tooth whitener before a date, and Phoebe tells Rachel that she kissed Ralph Lauren at Rachels workplace.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Ross Got High
programme.desc: On Thanksgiving, Chandler tries to gain favour with Monicas parents Jack and Judy, but an old secret involving Ross causes problems that he is unaware of. Meanwhile, Rachel proves she is no domestic goddess when she creates a quite disastrous dessert.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Joey plots the perfect opportunity to kiss Janine, while Ross and Monica resurrect their silly high school dance routine for a television special.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Apothecary Table
programme.desc: Joey is on cloud nine when he starts to date Janine, but she doesnt like his friends, and Rachel worries that Phoebe wont appreciate the way she furnishes their apartment.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross and Chandler bicker over which of them created a raunchy joke, Phoebe antagonises Monica and Rachel with her candour, and Joey reluctantly takes a job at Central Perk.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Joey gets in trouble for giving female customers free food at Central Perk, and after her father cuts her off, Rachels sister Jill comes to town. Rachel talks Jill into asking Ross out, and later, Ross and Jill return to his apartment. As he closes the drapes, Rachel looks on from Monica and Chandlers apartment.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Chandler Cant Cry
programme.desc: Chandler admits that he hasnt cried since he was a child, Phoebe discovers that Ursula is starring in porno movies using her name, and Rachel desperately tries to stop her sister Jill from starting a relationship with Ross.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One That Could Have Been
programme.desc: Rachel tells her friends about Barry and Mindys impending divorce and wonders what life would have been like if she had married him. This leads the others to speculate how their lives could have turned out too.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One That Could Have Been
programme.desc: In the second episode showing what could have happened to the friends had their lives taken different paths, Carol and Ross decide to have a threesome to spice up their marriage, while Rachel goes to Joeys and kisses him and then catches Barry cheating.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Chandler gets into trouble with his homemade gift for Monica, Ross tries to teach martial arts to Rachel and Phoebe, and Joey hires a look-alike.

programme.title: Beethovens 2nd
programme.desc: Comedic sequel reuniting the grown-up St Bernard Beethoven and his reluctant owner, George Newton, and family. Beethoven discovers love as he turns his attention to Missy, who belongs to the heartless Regina, and soon four puppies arrive in the world. While the little dogs cause havoc in the Newton household, Regina makes plans to steal them.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Ross Dates a Student
programme.desc: When a fire damages their apartment, Rachel and Phoebe must choose between living temporarily with Joey or Monica. Meanwhile, Ross gets into trouble at work, and Chandler tries to help Joeys career.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross worries when his student girlfriend Liz goes on holiday with her wild friends. Meanwhile, Rachel is desperate to find a date for a charity ball, and Joeys fridge breaks down.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With Mac and C.H.E.E.S.E.
programme.desc: Joey is excited about his audition for a major television action series about a man and his crimefighting robot, but Chandler almost ruins everything.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Ross Meets Elizabeths Dad
programme.desc: Ross fails to impress his girlfriends father who proves tricky to get on with, and Phoebe makes Chandler and Monica paranoid by chronicling their every move in a supposedly fictional book she is writing.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Pauls the Man

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Since she is the only one who knows that Chandler plans to ask Monica to marry him, Phoebe helps Chandler shop for a wedding ring, while Rachels wish for Paul to reveal his emotions creates a new set of problems.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Chandlers romantic marriage proposal is ruined when Monicas former boyfriend returns, Joey accidentally buys a boat, and a dormitory incident reminds Ross how young his girlfriend is.

programme.title: Friends

programme.desc: Will Mellor and a team of experts delve into the case of Steven Jones, who tried to use his police knowledge to get away with the murder of his wife Madallin.

programme.title: Murder on Trial
programme.desc: Police found the nude bodies of three women shot dead and abandoned in secluded areas outside Daytona Beach. A serial killer was on the loose. The case went cold for nearly a decade until the discovery of a 4th female victim yielded forensic DNA.

programme.title: Murder on Trial
programme.desc: In a chilling tale of betrayal, Nikki Sue Entzel plotted with her lover to kill her husband, staging a deadly fire to cash in on life insurance-love, lies, and murder igniting a deadly conspiracy.

programme.title: Murder on Trial
programme.desc: Hunters discover the body of a woman in the Georgia woods. As detectives launch a homicide investigation, attention turns to her husband, a former Navy lawyer, whose account raises more questions than answers.

programme.title: Murder on Trial
programme.desc: Celebrity hairdresser Fabio Sementilli seemed to have it all-fame, a loving family, a luxury lifestyle. But when he was found stabbed to death and his sports car stolen, detectives uncovered a chilling murder plot.

programme.title: Murder at the Motel
programme.desc: In 2015, Abigail "Abby" Cozad was found dead in a Colorado motel room; years earlier, Abby had suffered a traumatic brain injury in a drunk-driving crash, leaving her vulnerable and overly trusting.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: When 9-year-old Campfire Girl, Candy Rogers, turns up dead after selling mints door-to-door, Spokane detectives launch a dogged campaign to find her killer - one of the longest cold case investigations in Washington State history.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: New. Murder by Moonlight: On Easter Sunday 1992, the body of Lisa Ziegert is found in a field. But it takes 20 years before DNA phenotyping can put a face to the killer. (S2, ep 9)

programme.title: Tell Me How I Died
programme.desc: What begins as an open-and-shut case spins into a full-on investigation when a mother and son are found dead in their home.

programme.title: Murder on Trial
programme.desc: The father of four children, Gregory Rice vanished without a trace. Weeks later, fishermen made a grisly discovery in the Little Pee Dee River, his body wrapped in a tarp, unravelling a murder mystery steeped in deception and a hidden affair.

programme.title: Cold Case Files

programme.title: Ross Kemp: Lost Boys, Deadly Men

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder
programme.desc: When a beloved college student dies under suspicious circumstances, controversy rages for years between dueling investigators, medical examiners, and her family until a final shocking conclusion is reached.

programme.title: Expedition X

programme.title: Expedition X

programme.title: Expedition X
programme.desc: Josh Gates sends Phil and Jess to reportedly the most haunted place in America - Mackinac Island. This remote island has experienced over a thousand years of bloodshed, and residents report they are now plagued by terrifying paranormal activity.

programme.title: The Last Woodsmen
programme.desc: In the Pacific Northwest, Jared Douglas and his logging crew risk life and limb to harvest the planets remote and valuable trees, but getting these giants from the forest to market is deadly.

programme.title: The Last Woodsmen
programme.desc: In the logging world, big wood equals big money; its a tough job for the crews logging and transporting the big and valuable timber.

programme.title: The Last Woodsmen
programme.desc: In the logging world, big wood equals big money. Its a tough job for the crews logging and transporting the biggest, most valuable timber on Earth.

programme.title: The Last Woodsmen
programme.desc: Facing the devastation of losing the Forever Claim, Jared makes a desperate deal with the powerful businessman who outbid him -- but new challenges could destroy his logging season before it begins.

programme.title: The Last Woodsmen
programme.desc: Fallers face gnarly timber challenges, but it will all be for nothing if Jared and crew cant get the 140-ton super snorkel up the mountain.

programme.title: The Last Woodsmen
programme.desc: Stretched thin and desperately off-pace, Jared watches a loader tumble down the road; foreman Brad attempts to land his plane in choppy weather but is forced to shelter nearby; Barge Day arrives.

programme.title: Gold Rush
programme.desc: The boys are back in Alaska (although Discovery dropped the states mention in the title after the first season) hoping to strike it rich mining for gold. Their first effort was anything but rich and glorious, however, as the crew led by Todd Hoffman and his father, Jack, sunk $250,000 into their dream and came away with just $20,000 worth of gold. The dismal summer was filled with injuries, malfunctioning equipment and constant fighting among the greenhorn miners, yet their serious case of gold fever trumps any talk of giving up and leads to a new operating plan in order to salvage their dream. The series also keeps tabs on the efforts of teenager Parker Schnabel and old-timer Dakota Fred to hit the mother lode at separate sites.

programme.title: Ed Staffords Rite of Passage
programme.desc: In Mongolia, Ed must wrestle the giant heirs of Genghis Khan to become a man. He takes part in the annual rite of passage festival, Naadam.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team renovate an off-the-grid camp for a family of city slickers. With limited resources, they work to incorporate the comforts of city living into the camp, along with creating more privacy in their sleeping quarters.

programme.title: Ed Staffords Rite of Passage
programme.desc: Ed travels to the Ecuadorian rainforest to meet the Waorani, hunting monkeys and crocodiles, making poison blow-darts, and finding out what life it like with no number higher than five.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle

programme.title: Expedition Files
programme.desc: Was the Hindenburg truly destroyed by accident or by sabotage?; could the famous Patterson-Gimlin Bigfoot footage hold clues that only modern analysis can define?; what really happened when 50,000 Persian soldiers disappeared in 524 B.C.?

programme.desc: Tim and Tickle bottle their first illegal run together in 14 years; Mark and Digger reintroduce their corn liquor to the outlaw market, only to find their price undercut by a competitor; Josh gets a wakeup call about the law.

programme.title: Moonshiners
programme.desc: Mark and Digger reverse-engineer a counterfeit jar of shine that is flooding the outlaw market. When Josh discovers footprints near his still site, he reopens the underground bunker site he built a decade ago. Jerry helps Mike design.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: Mike and Ant dive into the European sports car market with a 1969 Opel GT. It suffers fresh body damage, a backfiring engine, shoddy brakes, and faulty headlights.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: Mike finds a rare, rally-bred 1972 Lancia Fulvia. He and Ant must fix its bad CV joints, a broken heater, cracked dash and a debris-clogged fuel system.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: Mike and Ant drag a rare 1972 Datsun 510 2-door into the 21st century. The engine is in good order, but the bad paint job, gearbox and bodywork let it down.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: The Raneys explore their most epic rescues, counting down to the five most hostile and dangerous states that present the most gruelling challenges for new homesteaders.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: A young family is on the brink of giving up during their first brutal winter in Arizonas high desert. As another round of snowstorms approaches, the Raneys race to solve the homesteads freezing water, food issues, and inadequate livestock quarters.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: A Colorado war veterans family and stable of horses are ravaged by hurricane-force winds that make subsistence all but impossible. But when the Raneys learn of their larger dream, they pull out the stops with some of their most creative builds yet.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: Oregon homesteaders find their dream in jeopardy following a near-fatal accident; the Raneys face a daunting rescue where a dilapidated bridge has cut them off from their land, and strict building regulations force them to get creative.

programme.title: Moonshiners
programme.desc: After rivals destroy Tims Canada-bound moonshine, he relocates his tariff-dodging operation to Kentucky, where neighbours follow their own unwritten code.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller
programme.desc: Mark, Digger, and Tim judge as three former champions turn unlabelled canned goods into high-proof liquor. In a final-round twist, the judges take it full circle by challenging the finalists to transform their finished spirit back.

programme.sub-title: Barn Storming: A Wild Takedown In Pleasantville, Ohio
programme.desc: Mark and the crew have fought rain, snow and heat, but never winds like these. The vicious Ohio winds turn a complicated job into a treacherous one.

programme.desc: Poised to bootleg their first tariff-free liquor to Canada, Tim and Tickle encounter armed opposition hellbent on torching their plans.

programme.title: Teleshopping

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: Mike and Ant enter the market for iconic American SUVs with a 1988 Jeep Grand Wagoneer, but it has a sagging suspension and a defective four-wheel drive.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: Mike and Ant take on a 1987 Alfa Romeo Spider Quadrifoglio with a rare hardtop. It needs extensive repairs, including a rebuild of the propshaft.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: Mike takes on a Porsche 924, the first car he ever turned around on the series. Will fixing oil leaks and worn interior be enough earn a profit?

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: Mike and Ant dive into the European sports car market with a 1969 Opel GT. It suffers fresh body damage, a backfiring engine, shoddy brakes, and faulty headlights.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: Mike finds a rare, rally-bred 1972 Lancia Fulvia. He and Ant must fix its bad CV joints, a broken heater, cracked dash and a debris-clogged fuel system.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: Mike and Ant drag a rare 1972 Datsun 510 2-door into the 21st century. The engine is in good order, but the bad paint job, gearbox and bodywork let it down.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: The Raneys explore their most epic rescues, counting down to the five most hostile and dangerous states that present the most gruelling challenges for new homesteaders.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: A young family is on the brink of giving up during their first brutal winter in Arizonas high desert. As another round of snowstorms approaches, the Raneys race to solve the homesteads freezing water, food issues, and inadequate livestock quarters.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: A Colorado war veterans family and stable of horses are ravaged by hurricane-force winds that make subsistence all but impossible. But when the Raneys learn of their larger dream, they pull out the stops with some of their most creative builds yet.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: Oregon homesteaders find their dream in jeopardy following a near-fatal accident; the Raneys face a daunting rescue where a dilapidated bridge has cut them off from their land, and strict building regulations force them to get creative.

programme.title: Moonshiners
programme.desc: After rivals destroy Tims Canada-bound moonshine, he relocates his tariff-dodging operation to Kentucky, where neighbours follow their own unwritten code.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller
programme.desc: Mark, Digger, and Tim judge as three former champions turn unlabelled canned goods into high-proof liquor. In a final-round twist, the judges take it full circle by challenging the finalists to transform their finished spirit back.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.sub-title: Barn Storming: A Wild Takedown In Pleasantville, Ohio
programme.desc: Mark and the crew have fought rain, snow and heat, but never winds like these. The vicious Ohio winds turn a complicated job into a treacherous one.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: Car dealer Mike Brewer, along with a trusted mechanic, is on a mission to find and restore iconic cars to sell for a profit.

programme.title: Truck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Jerry Jr. learns that legendary chef Guy Fieri has bought a used Apocalypse Hellfire truck at an auction, he offers Guy free customisation; Frank locks in a deal to build a custom Overland truck for internet superstar Nick The Wrangler Bishop.

programme.title: Shortys Dream Shop
programme.desc: Shorty takes on the huge challenge of making a Vietnam veterans long-bed 69 C10 cool. He hopes to achieve that by taking the truck back to stock, with original two-tone paint and mouldings, a new stance, an updated interior and new wheels.

programme.title: Shortys Dream Shop
programme.desc: A 1971 Cutlass is starting to show its age, with some styling thats best left in the 70s. Shorty and the team knock the urban cowboy out of the car and beef it up with muscle, swapping in a rebuilt 5.3 LS, plus new paint, interior, and wheels.

programme.title: Shortys Dream Shop
programme.desc: NFL linebacker, Matt Judon, wants to transform his fathers 1977 Eldorado and bring it back to its original glory; the guys get the body straight and rust free with a new pearl white paint job; upgrades to the motor, AC, interior and more.

programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.desc: An explosion in the discovery of exoplanets is challenging everything we know about our universe; experts use cutting-edge astronomy to investigate these mysterious alien worlds and how they defy the laws of physics.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing
programme.desc: In 1962, three convicts try to escape from Alcatraz prison. Officials believe the men drowned, but a scientific experiment suggests they made it to shore.

programme.desc: Josh travels to UK and Norway to unlock the secrets of the Viking Sunstone, a mystic crystal the Vikings used to conquer the seas. Before testing it, he explores a crypt in a Nordic church and descends 1000ft into a deserted mine.

programme.title: Kindig Customs
programme.desc: Lloyd Carney is an engineer and gear head with an extensive car collection full of classics, but there is something missing. Can Dave and the crew help?

programme.title: Kindig Customs
programme.desc: An old client, Vinnie, was blown away by the work Dave and the team did on his Charger. Now he is back for their help building the greatest Mopar on the planet.

programme.title: Three Men Four Wheels
programme.desc: Marino wants to prove that the Subaru Impreza is the greatest rally car of all time. His ride in this famous rally car - once driven by Colin McRae - proves to be a special experience.

programme.title: Three Men Four Wheels
programme.desc: Drew champions arguably the most successful racing car of all time - the Bugatti T35. He thinks its the finest car ever built, but Marino and Andy will need convincing that this 90-year-old car is the greatest of all time.

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs
programme.desc: Chad attempts to transform a rusted-out 1971 Pinto into a European-style performance car. He must overcome a mountain of problems and beat a tight deadline.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Colourful men and women get behind the wheel of monster trucks as they tackle extreme conditions over the toughest roads and loneliest highways of the Australian outback in order to deliver their goods on time.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Steve Grahame faces a major detour that could wipe out his profits, Luke Gilroy transports a 200-tonne transformer vital for Queenslands power grid, and Jack Macrae makes another attempt to deliver a dream home.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Steve Grahame is desperate to cross a remote river before wild weather sets in, Mel Michelsen tackles one of the most dangerous and difficult jobs in trucking, and Robbie Bush squeezes a $180,000 cabin through Australias biggest city.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Sludge takes on a last-ditch trucking job, Alicia Waddingham transports a hazardous load on heavily corrugated roads, and Hibbo takes on Australias harsh deserts and unpredictable oncoming mega loads.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Jim Foody transports critical medical supplies through flood-ravaged roads, Jake Pakai hauls multimillion-dollar equipment across narrow highways, and Robbie Mackay faces a tight curfew in a high-stakes double house move.

programme.title: Texas Metal
programme.desc: Bill is hard on his trucks, and thats especially true of his Baja-style 2017 F-150 race truck; after one too many jumps, Bill is ready to wake it up one more time; the team designs a one-of-one suspension for a 1952 wrecker truck.

programme.title: Texas Metal
programme.desc: Bill thought hed done it all until a 2022 Ford Lightning rolls in and becomes Ekstensives first custom air ride with an all-electric drivetrain. The team stays old school by dropping a classic 52 Wrecker to the floor with a supercharged LT4.

programme.title: Texas Metal
programme.desc: Bill sees a custom-made opportunity to turn a smashed 2022 Jeep Gladiator into a custom truck; the side-by-side scene has exploded in Texas, and Ekstensive gets a shot to show what theyve got with a brand-new Polaris Ranger XP 1000.

programme.title: Garage Squad
programme.desc: A Vietnam-era 1968 Kaiser Jeep gets pressed back into service. This grandfather-grandson project was bigger than expected so the crew have a job on their hands!

programme.title: Garage Squad
programme.desc: A father dedicates a 1965 Mustang rebuild to the memory of his daughter. The team pulls out all the stops to bring the classic car back to its best.

programme.title: Garage Squad
programme.desc: A husband asks the team to help restore a 1969 Chevy Suburban. He bought it to help his wifes music school move equipment but its too big a task for one man.

programme.title: Shed and Buried
programme.desc: Henry and Sam are in the Lancashire countryside at Johns garage, where theyre surrounded by hundreds of trinkets. They encounter various military vehicles and treasures - and also a lovely old petrol pump.

programme.title: Shed and Buried

programme.title: Shed and Buried
programme.desc: Henry and Sam continue their Northern Ireland adventure with Gordon. The luck of the Irish strikes and they get off to a great start, with lots to marvel at. They find army vehicles, tractors and some very well hidden Land Rovers.

programme.desc: Its the homeward leg and the good old Metisse Steve McQueen Desert Racer has nearly made it! The crews legendary fixer Predrag Blagojevic takes Henry around his home town of Nis before a quick trip into Sofia, Bulgaria.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: Mike Brewer and Ant Anstead work together to give new life to run-down classic automobiles to resell them at a profit. Working on a tight budget, Mike must find a vehicle for Ant to fix, but that isnt always the easiest task.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers

programme.desc: Lorne Abony is the CEO and Chairman of in-store media provider Mood Media, one of the fastest growing companies in America. He adopts a disguise and goes undercover in his own business to find out how efficiently it is functioning.

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Jim Rogers from Billings, Montana, is the Chairman and CEO of Kampgrounds of America (KOA). Jim goes undercover in his own business disguised as an accountant who has recently been made redundant.

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon helps Peters Italian Restaurant in Babylon, New York where the peace of Long Island shore is regularly shattered by the antics of the volatile Pellegrino family, who run the restaurant.

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The Mixing Bowl, a bijou diner in Bellmore, New York, is run by talented chef Billy with his wife Lisa and their manager Mike. Despite Billys flair in the kitchen, the business is haemorrhaging money via Mikes out-of-control marketing plans.

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits the Seascape restaurant in the seaside village of Islip in Long Island, New York. Owner Peter Matthews has been struggling for seven years to make the business viable and now hes nearly reached the end of the line.

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon tries to help put a deserted California restaurant back on the map; the restaurants owner does not want to accept the changes, which leads to a screaming match.

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Lelas is a fine dining restaurant in Pomona, California, run by inexperienced owner Lela and young chef Ricky. The fatal combination of her ineptitude and his arrogance has resulted in a business so rocky that its about to close down for good.

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host. Jon Richardson and Roisin Conaty take on Rob Beckett and Kiell Smith-Bynoe. Lou Wall joins Susie in Dictionary Corner.

programme.title: Bill Bailey: Part Troll
programme.desc: Bill Bailey, fresh off of his success from Never Mind the Buzzcocks and Blacks, takes to the stages of Britain with a blend of music and comedy about our daily lives with his Part Troll tour.

programme.title: Black Books
programme.desc: Bernard and Manny agree to teach a psychotic ex-convict to read, while Fran has some problems with her new job.

programme.title: Black Books
programme.desc: Manny is attracted by the outlay and outlook of competitor `Goliath Books and tries to convince Bernard that the shop needs an overhaul. Meanwhile, Fran takes comfort in the care of her exotic new-found cousins.

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats
programme.desc: Best bits from the last series of 8 Out of 10 Cats, with Jimmy Carr, Rob Beckett, Katherine Ryan, Tom Allen, Rosie Jones, Phil Wang, Gemma Collins, Richard Osman and many more.

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Uncut
programme.desc: An extended version of the show in which new team captain Jon Richardson joins Sean Lock and host Jimmy Carr. With guests Hannibal Buress, Sam Buttery, Stephen Mangan and Katherine Ryan.

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Uncut
programme.desc: Host Jimmy Carr and team captains Sean Lock and Jon Richardson are joined by guests David Hasselhoff, Rachel Riley, Rob Beckett and Justin Moorhouse.

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Can two singletons find love based on naked attraction alone? Student Marlie needs to stay away from bad boys, while Adam from Bradford craves a woman with no secrets.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam reveals that Barry never completed his community service requirement. Erica plans for her and Geoff to follow The Grateful Dead all summer.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly marshals everyone for one last family vacation to Disneyland. Erica worries that Geoff wants to break up. Guest starring Christie Brinkley.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam gets a blast from the past in the shape of Dana - his first love. Meanwhile, Erica and Barry are heading to college with nowhere to live.

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: Nathan was worried hed made a grave mistake by planning a Mexican Day of the Dead wedding for demanding bride Jenna. Nathan, best man Kennedy, Jenna, and bridesmaid Lucy relive the big decisions that led to his frightful fiesta.

programme.title: LEGO Masters: Australia
programme.desc: In the last elimination round, the teams must build a dwelling on a sheer cliff face. And one team try something different from everyone else.

programme.title: The Amazing Race Australia: Celebrity Edition
programme.desc: Eleven Aussie celebs are paired up with their nearest and dearest in a thrilling, globe-trotting race to win money for charity. First stop: the busy streets of New Delhi.

programme.title: Made in Chelsea
programme.desc: As the gang descend upon an estate in Scotland, Sam Prince is looking for a Highland fling, but a shock arrival from his past scuppers his romantic plans. And things are frosty for Livvy and Chuggs.

programme.title: Made in Chelsea
programme.desc: Inga and Jazzs ever-tightening friendship doesnt go unnoticed. Beks and Philip continue to grow close, but Beks isnt sure the spark is there. And will an unexpected bombshell spell disaster for Livvy and Kits rekindled romance?

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The Mixing Bowl, a bijou diner in Bellmore, New York, is run by talented chef Billy with his wife Lisa and their manager Mike. Despite Billys flair in the kitchen, the business is haemorrhaging money via Mikes out-of-control marketing plans.

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits the Seascape restaurant in the seaside village of Islip in Long Island, New York. Owner Peter Matthews has been struggling for seven years to make the business viable and now hes nearly reached the end of the line.

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon tries to help put a deserted California restaurant back on the map; the restaurants owner does not want to accept the changes, which leads to a screaming match.

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: Its time for the final weddings of the experiment. Stella and Filip quickly discover shared values, but doubts soon surface. And in a MAFS Australia first, Julia enters the experiment not knowing whether shell be marrying a man or a woman.

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: After weeks of honeymoons filled with romance, laughter and the occasional clash, the couples return from paradise to face their first major test: the first dinner party.

programme.title: My Spy
programme.desc: Nine-year-old Sophie catches JJ, a hardened CIA operative, spying on her family during a routine surveillance operation. In exchange for not blowing his cover, JJ begrudgingly agrees to show the precocious girl how to become a spy. What at first seems like an easy task soon turns into a battle of wits as Sophie proves you dont need much experience to outsmart a seasoned agent.

programme.title: Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: Four teens embark on the adventure of a lifetime when a video game magically transports them to the jungle and transforms them into adults.

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: Stacey Solomon, Joe Swash, Denise Van Outen and Johnny Vaughan hit the sofa for the weeks top telly. Also on the Box are Danny and Dani Dyer and Ashley Banjo and Sara Cox.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Britains sharpest armchair critics share more of their sharp, insightful, passionate and sometimes emotional critiques of the weeks biggest and best shows on television.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Britains sharpest armchair critics share more of their sharp, insightful, passionate and sometimes emotional critiques of the weeks biggest and best shows on television.

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: The First Dates restaurant welcomes more singletons hoping to find romance. Rebecca has a date wit tree surgeon David. while DJ Gordon, who has two children with lesbian friends, is looking for a man to share his life with.

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Self-confessed `player Geo is pulling out all the stops to find a girl. Will a bunch of flowers and champagne impress 19-year-old Heather?

programme.title: Apocalypse Now
programme.desc: The definitive examination of the American experience in the Vietnam War, which centres on captain Benjamin Willard who is sent up river to find and kill insane renegade colonel Walter Kurtz.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Fantastic Voyage
programme.desc: A surgical task force is reduced to microbe size to perform a delicate operation inside the brain of a dying diplomat.

programme.title: The Incredible Shrinking Man
programme.desc: An encounter with a strange mist leaves Scott Carey with a big problem , hes shrinking and fast. Can he learn to live in miniature? Director Jack Arnold broke new ground with his innovative special effects in this classic science fiction flick.

programme.title: Captain Phillips Interview
programme.desc: Tom Hanks and director Paul Greengrass talk about taking to the sea to make the fact-based dramatic-thriller `Captain Phillips.

programme.title: Rat Race
programme.desc: A Las Vegas casino owner decides to set up a special event for his highest rollers. Lucky tokens in his slot machines entitle six punters to enter a race across America with $2 million as the prize. He makes a killing on the bets placed on the players, while the contestants dash for the cash.

programme.title: Made in Italy
programme.desc: A bohemian artist travels from London to Italy with his estranged son to sell the house they inherited from his late wife.

programme.title: See How They Run
programme.desc: In 1950s London, a world-weary inspector and an eager rookie constable take on a puzzling whodunit within the glamorously sordid world of underground theatre, investigating a mysterious murder at their own peril.

programme.title: Captain Phillips Interview
programme.desc: Tom Hanks and director Paul Greengrass talk about taking to the sea to make the fact-based dramatic-thriller `Captain Phillips.

programme.title: Captain Phillips
programme.desc: In 2009, Somali pirates storm a U.S. containership and hold Capt. Richard Phillips and his crew captive.

programme.title: Old
programme.desc: A thriller about a family on a tropical holiday who discover that the secluded beach where they are relaxing for a few hours is somehow causing them to age rapidly reducing their entire lives into a single day.

programme.title: Hearts of Darkness: A Filmmakers Apocalypse
programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes look at the making of `Apocalypse Now, one of the most gruelling productions in film history.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri dives into delicious dishes on both coasts. In Palo Alto, a funky joint puts out fresh California cooking, like spicy pork and knockout gnocchi. In Wilmington, a bakery-restaurant makes major meatloaf.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Loading up the meat with bomb beef and bird; in North Conway, N.H., a funky joint is putting Thai in their tacos, and a local gem in Emerald Isle, N.C., is firin up big barbecue; in Taos, N.M., a traditional spot serves up New Mexican specialities.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri hunts down all kinds of meaty favourites, starting with an Irish pubs cottage pie in Louisville. Then he grabs Asian-barbecue fusion and burgers with toppings like pimento cheese at two stops in North Carolina.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri road trips across America to check out classic greasy spoons. With a new generation of owners and delicious homemade food, these are the kind of places that make America special.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa
programme.desc: Its competition time and battle of the taste buds as Ina and her friends Eli Zabar and David Ziff plan a pot luck dinner. They each take a course with a Mediterranean theme. But first theres breakfast at Inas to discuss the plan over delicious tri-berry pancakes.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa
programme.desc: Tarragon potato salad; chunky blue cheese dressing; vegetable coleslaw; guacamole.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa
programme.desc: Inas making over classic dishes and turning up the volume with new ingredients and cooking methods. By daring to be different Ina transforms dishes with a big flavour payoff. Theres Easy parmesan risotto, deconstructed strawberry shortcakes and a new take on breakfast, Eggs Columbian, a favourite at local cafe and speciality food store Marys Marvellous.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa
programme.desc: This is all about comfort food as Ina cooks up modern day comfort classics. Helping her is New York caterer Mary Giuliani, famous for her miniature grilled cheese sandwich canapes plus theres French toast bread pudding and Seafood pot pie. This is comfort for breakfast, dinner and entertaining.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa
programme.desc: Ina surprises Jeffrey with a Birthday at a surprise location, historic building Home Sweet Home.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa
programme.desc: Ina is working on an article about brunch and calls in the help of team brunch. Local florist Michael Grimm creates a flower display to go on the brunch table set and photographed by Miguel Florres. Theres baked blintzes with blueberry sauce, apricot butter, roasted hazelnut granola and a fruit platter.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Cooking for Less
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver creates deliciously gnarly recipes for under a quid a portion, from simple stuffed chicken, microwave chilli con carne and a pizza with no oven, to turning a humble pancake into a showstopper.

programme.title: Jamies Comfort Food
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver takes on three comfort food classics. Hes also joined by friend Christian, aka `DJ BBQ, to reveal his ultimate burger - including what cut of meat to use (chuck steak), how to cook it and what to have on the side.

programme.title: Jamies Comfort Food
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver is joined by his friend Gennaro to make the perfect bolognese ravioli. Jamie also creates the ultimate cheese toastie and he cooks his take on the nations favourite dish - chicken tikka masala - cooked over an open fire.

programme.title: James Martins Islands to Highlands
programme.desc: James is joined by Galton Blackiston, his pal and a top-class, Michelin-starred chef. They don diving suits to swim with seals, and hire an unusual mode of transport to take them around the islands. Galton visits a sea salt farm and delivers some back to James, who uses it to cook up some wonderful salt-baked sea bass. James finds an unusual restaurant situated in the middle of a post office, and finishes off the day cooking roast duck by a stunning seashore.

programme.title: James Martins Islands to Highlands
programme.desc: James returns to one of his favourite places in the UK: the beautiful county of Cornwall. Joining him is his close pal and Michelin-starred chef Galton Blackiston. During their trip they discover some world-class Cornish ice cream, and Galton visits Newlyn fish market to pick up some Cornish cod. James cooks the cod along with Cornish oysters and a warm tartare sauce. They both round off the day with a painting challenge on Sennen beach, where they try out their oil painting skills.

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers Comfort Food
programme.desc: The Bikers take everyday ingredients and transform them into comforting dishes that are both satisfying and surprising. Bananas are transformed into a sophisticated tarte tatin, and some simple ricotta cheese is the basis for gnudi - light, delicious Italian dumplings.

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers Comfort Food
programme.desc: Si and Dave cook dishes to feed a multitude, just the thing to impress your guests or to fill up the family. Their salmon pie with spinach and hollandaise is a showstopper, and their chocolate and cherry buns makes a perfect centrepiece.

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers Comfort Food
programme.desc: Si and Dave cook dishes for when the temperature drops and the weather calls for sugar and spice and good hearty cooking. This means oxtail soup with herby dumplings, a vegetarian chestnut and mushroom pie and a new take on an old favourite, treacle sponge.

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers Comfort Food
programme.desc: The Hairy Bikers cook comfort food oozing with traditional values. Theres a twist on a classic pudding, a perfect teatime treat and Si and Dave take two breakfast favourites to make one lip-smacking new dish.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation
programme.desc: Adam Richmans culinary quest has him hitting the streets to seek out the best eats. First, he heads south to Tampa Bay, where he samples some authentic Mexican tacos.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation
programme.desc: Adam Richmans eating adventure has brought him to St Paul, Minnesota. First, Adam heads to Punch Pizza where hell get to taste an authentic margherita pizza pie.

programme.title: Adam Richman Eats Britain
programme.desc: Adam ticks Yorkshire Pudding in Yorkshire off his foodie bucket list. Then, he tries Yorkshire parkin, local rabbit, and a Yorkshire tea-inspired dessert.

programme.title: Adam Richman Eats Britain
programme.desc: Adam heads to Kent to try a very special sandwich in Sandwich. There, he also tries Whitstable oysters, traditional fish and chips, and a new baked sensation, the cruffin.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieris getting into next-level seafood, sammies and more! A joint in Baton Rouge, LA, is knocking out a killer Cuban, a Gainesville, FL, bakery is rocking an artichoke croissant, and a spot in Tallahassee, FL, is putting pineapples in spotlight.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Fieris grabbing unique eats across the South! An uncle-nephew duo is changing the game in Gainesville, FL, with a fried chicken sandwich. Plus, theres Mexican gone vegan in Dallas, and a spot in Baton Rouge, LA, is putting their stamp on pot pie.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieris heading east to get a taste of the South. A smokehouse in New Hampshire is putting their own spin on meatloaf, a funky North Carolina joint is spicin up their shrimp and a historic Florida spot is making a standout seafood stew.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Loading up the meat with bomb beef and bird; in North Conway, N.H., a funky joint is putting Thai in their tacos, and a local gem in Emerald Isle, N.C., is firin up big barbecue; in Taos, N.M., a traditional spot serves up New Mexican specialities.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri road trips across America to check out classic greasy spoons. With a new generation of owners and delicious homemade food, these are the kind of places that make America special.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is travelling the country and digging into awesome bird and beef. In Longmont, a fried chicken emporium serves up their specialty, along with unique chicharrones.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri digs into hearty handfuls of major flavour, like next-level pizza in Tennessee, tasty tacos in Alberta, and elevated empanadas in Georgia.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri visits Americas most interesting and unique restaurants. Guy visits a diner with fresh French bread in Kentucky, a burger spot in Minnesota, and a cafe run by an ex-marine in California.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri visits Americas most interesting and unique restaurants. In California Guy tries a Tuscan-style Italian restaurant, in North Carolina he has fish tacos and in Honolulu its shepherds pie.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri visits Americas most interesting and unique restaurants. Guy visits a farmers market in South Carolina, an Italian spot in New York, and finds a fresh spin on a fish classic in Honolulu.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri visits Americas most interesting and unique restaurants. Guy follows the regulars to an El Salvadoran cafe in Santa Fe, a barbecue haunt in Salt Lake City and a creole spot in Mississippi.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives

programme.desc: This trip, Guys hit the gold mine of surf and turf. In Horn Lake, Mississippi, a Memphis-style barbecue joint puts the championship touch on ribs, cheese fritters, and burgers with pork rinds.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri visits Americas most interesting and unique restaurants. In California Guy tries a Tuscan-style Italian restaurant, in North Carolina he has fish tacos and in Honolulu its shepherds pie.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation
programme.desc: Adams all-American eats lands him in Louisville, Kentucky, home to bluegrass, bourbon and the Kentucky Derby. Adam starts off at the legendary Brown Hotel to try a taste of the original Hot Brown.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation
programme.desc: Adam travels to Dallas to sample Texas-style bratwurst and BBQ brisket; a Texan seeks victory over five pounds of Vietnamese Pho in under 30 minutes.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation
programme.desc: Adam Richmans eating expedition has brought him to the capital city of the Ocean State - Providence, Rhode Island. Adam first heads over to Bob And Timmys to try their unique grilled pizza.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation
programme.desc: Adam Richmans tasty travels take him on a road trip across the Main Street of America, Route 66. Adams first stop is in St Louis, Missouri, to try some famous frozen custards.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation
programme.desc: Adam Richmans culinary quest has him hitting the streets to seek out the best eats. First, he heads south to Tampa Bay, where he samples some authentic Mexican tacos.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation
programme.desc: A sampling of Wisconsins finest meats and an eating challenge in under 23 minutes.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation
programme.desc: The nationwide quest for tasty eats has led Adam Richman to the historic city of Savannah, Georgia. First, Adam heads to Sweet Potatoes for a taste of peach glazed BBQ chicken, a southern classic.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation
programme.desc: Adams cross-country culinary quest brings him to Portsmouth, New Hampshire. Adams first stop is Gilleys, which has been serving up delicious burgers for nearly a century.

programme.title: Man v Food
programme.desc: In Charleston, South Carolina, Adam gets a big serving of Southern charm and an even bigger helping of low country cuisine.

programme.title: Man v Food
programme.desc: In Knoxville, Tennessee, Adam braves the Gigante Burrito Challenge at Sweet Ps BBQ.

programme.title: James Martins Islands to Highlands
programme.desc: On the next leg of his UK tour, James is joined in glorious Devon by his friend and Michelin-starred chef Simon Hulstone. James visits an extraordinary mushroom farm situated in a bungalow, and makes a tasty steak and mushroom dish. Simon samples some award-winning cheese, which inspires James to make a cheese platter fit for a king. The day ends with a trip to the Art Deco splendour of Burgh Island.

programme.title: James Martins Islands to Highlands
programme.desc: James is joined by pal and Michelin-starred chef Mark Jordan, and together they set out to explore the delights of Jersey aboard mini motor bikes. James samples the delights of one of Jerseys most famous exports, the Jersey Royal potato, and he uses them to cook up a squid risotto with a difference. Mark Jordan gets a lesson in oyster shucking, and James discovers an island speciality: Jersey black butter, which he uses to create a delicious sweet treat.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas lead 12 new bakers in a brand-new bubble through new challenges set by judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith, in the nations most famous tent.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The remaining bakers take on more challenges set by judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith in the nations most famous tent, in a bid to be crowned star baker.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: This week its time to bake bread, and the remaining bakers have a lot to prove. They put their own twist on a classic Italian focaccia in the Signature and head slightly further east in the technical, making a Greek-inspired snack..

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
